race.description: Ladbrokes Top2/3/4 Betting F&M Bm62 Handicap
race.comment: SERINDA (8) resumes. She won her maiden first up at Bendigo last time in, taking on two good races next time out. This suits and she's still very lightly raced with more to offer. UNOBSCURED (9) resumes for her second campaign having shown good ability last time in. She ran quite well for an 80/1 shot before a break in a 3yo race won by Point Barrow which reads well. Can feature. SUGAR SCHNAPPS (5) has done little wrong in three runs to date and gets a 2kg weight swing on REGAL SECRET (1) from their clash at Kyneton. Fancy SUGAR SCHNAPPS has more upside now but both are worth consideration here.
